series_metadata.series_title: Global Positioning System/Automated Vehicle Location (GPS/AVL) Snow and Ice Dashboard Camera Photos
series_metadata.series_description: These photos are taken from dashboard cameras mounted on ODOT''s snow and ice fleet that are transferred from the field devices to the communication network. The photos will be used for training, operational analysis, and studies. The photo is saved for three consecutive days on a moving three day period. On day four, day one is erased.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Photos from each camera will be retained for three consecutive days. On day four, day one will be erased., Electronic: Erase
